stemHtml: When using the pressurized nitrogen bottle system for emergency landing gear extension…

options.a: The emergency system is automatically activated upon failure of the main system, allowing a one-shot extension of the landing gear.
options.b: The emergency system is automatically activated upon failure of the main system and can be used several times.
options.c: The emergency system is activated manually by pulling a handle in the cockpit, allowing a one-shot extension.
options.d: The emergency system is activated manually by pulling a handle in the cockpit, allowing the system to be used several times.
